title: MasonDweller
description: adds the mason dweller to ur world
body:
The Masondweller

Deep beneath Minecraft’s bedrock layer, in caves untouched by light, something ancient stirs — the Masondweller. Once a skilled builder, a mason of underground fortresses, he dug too far and uncovered something that changed him forever.

Now, the Masondweller lurks in the darkest, deepest parts of the world. He doesn’t walk — he creeps through stone itself. He seals tunnels behind players. He whispers through the cracks. Some say he’s made of cracked stone bricks, with glowing magma eyes and long, jagged arms that can shape bedrock like clay.

Players report strange signs: torches suddenly missing, fresh cobblestone walls in places you never built, or footsteps echoing behind you — even when you’re alone. One player, Noa, went exploring an ancient deep dark cave. Her last message was, “I think I saw something move behind the wall.”

All they found later was her pickaxe… embedded in a perfectly smooth stone wall, as if placed there deliberately.

Some believe the Masondweller protects something. Others think he is the last remnant of something much older. But one thing is certain:

If the walls start closing in, and you hear stone being placed behind you…
don’t turn around.
